case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. CHRISTOPHER R WEBER

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 75001750) AS TO DEFENDANT WEBER, CHRISTOPHER R
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210081248) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210081248) TO PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 74094019) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT WEBER, CHRISTOPHER R
DECLARATION OF PROPER VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 210081248) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210084311), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. SERVED MAY-22-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAY-23-2024 AS TO DEFENDANT WEBER, CHRISTOPHER R
DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 75001750) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF CALCULATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 75001750) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210081248) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT WEBER, CHRISTOPHER R NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-12-2024
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT CCP 585(D) (TRANSACTION ID # 75001750) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEBER, CHRISTOPHER R $22,455.60 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22,455.60, SEE SCANNED DOC
